Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, requiring precise stakeholder alignment across engineering and legal.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to cut planning cycle time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly expanding the team's LiveOps throughput without adding headcount.

Partnered with data teams to forecast KPI impact of new platform features pre-launch and reported actuals post-release, creating a closed-loop performance model that informed roadmap prioritization across enterprise partner integrations.

Monitored program performance daily using SQL and Tableau dashboards, pivoting execution calendars based on live data signals to protect **revenue-critical SLAs** and maintain recovery benchmarks across sovereign and commercial cloud environments.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, managing a prioritized backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and keep feature delivery on schedule across cross-functional engineering teams.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to align promotions with highest-value player-equivalent segments.
